questionHtml:
An electromagnetic wave enters a medium of lower refractive index.

Three statements are made:

I.   The wavelength of the wave has increased.
II.   The frequency of the wave has decreased.
III.  The speed of the wave has increased.

What is true about the properties of the wave?


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: An electromagnetic wave enters a medium of lower refractive index. Three statements are made: I. The wavelength of the wave has increased.II. The frequency of the wave has decrease
